jobs.title: Assistant Manager - Sales
jobs.description_preview: Main responsibilities To achieve the sales target in term of cCM1 and volume. Compile and update market information on potential customers, competitor’s activities and market situation. Provide the APO forecast with accuracy and control the goods stock in properly level.
